title: pyrus × mohacsyana
intro: Pyrus × mohacsyana, also known as the Mohacs service tree, is a hybrid of the service tree (Sorbus torminalis) and the wild pear (Pyrus pyraster). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Pyrus × mohacsyana include treating digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems. The plant is commonly used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
